item.title: Unlinked_Pages
item.description: Unlinked Notes Knee slice Double ankle grab pass Closed guard figure 8 Leg drag Toreando Double under Closed guard standing up Cross collar grip break to takedown Grip break on upper back Collar grip break downward Baseball choke Straight ankle lock Close guard overhook stiff Two grip choke on turtl...

item.title: Empty_Pages
item.description: Empty Notes Gogoplata Kimura Canto choke North south Figure-four grip Rubber guard Lapel Sleeve Collar De La Riva sweep Double leg .

item.title: Recently_Updated
item.description: Recently Updated Notes index Lockdown Sweep Star sweep Sweep Collar & Sleeve to takedown Fireman throw Arm drag Double leg Single leg README .

item.title: BJJ journey
item.description: Process Overall process is loosely based on Zettelkasten methodology, which has been changed to suit my tracking of BJJ journey.

item.title: README
item.description: Obsidian_BJJ Obsidian repository for BJJ notes.

item.title: X guards
item.description: Description Quite vague concept having the legs form a “X” shape while controlling the opponents leg(s).

item.title: Ankle-Waist-Shin
item.description: General This is often named or described as “basic” sweep, and rather than have it be extremely well defined it is more related to the broad concept.

item.title: Sweep
item.description: General Sweep is anything that sweeps the opponent your top position to a worse one.

item.title: Back
item.description: Top 3: Rear naked choke Armbar Bow and arrow Buying time You can buy time by using Underhook arm to grab their armpit and then hold tightly.

item.title: Open guard
item.description: General Any general on the floor position where you have distance between you and your opponent should be improved immediately by either increasing the distance and getting to [Standing or establishing at minimum some sort of open guard.
